synthetics.canary.s3encryption.CfnAbout: A structure that contains the configuration of the encryption-at-rest settings for artifacts that the canary uploads to Amazon S3. Artifact encryption functionality is available only for canaries that use Synthetics runtime version syn-nodejs-puppeteer-3.3 or later. For more information, see [Encrypting canary artifacts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/CloudWatch_Synthetics_artifact_encryption.html).

synthetics.canary.s3encryption.Encryptio.Description: The encryption method to use for artifacts created by this canary. Specify `SSE_S3` to use server-side encryption (SSE) with an Amazon S3-managed key. Specify `SSE-KMS` to use server-side encryption with a customer-managed AWS KMS key.  If you omit this parameter, an AWS-managed AWS KMS key is used.

synthetics.canary.s3encryption.KmsKeyArn.Description: The ARN of the customer-managed AWS KMS key to use, if you specify `SSE-KMS` for `EncryptionMode`
